title: cotoneaster crenulatus
intro: Cotoneaster crenulatus, also known as the Chinese cotoneaster or rock cotoneaster, is a type of deciduous shrub native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, which is attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Cotoneaster crenulatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are made by extracting its active compounds using solvents like ethanol or glycerin.
